reasoning: Polymarket odds on March 13 for BTC reaching $80k in March stood at 27% when BTC was trading near $73.5k with 18 days remaining. Since then, BTC has retraced to approximately $71,000 on March 15, and 2 days of time value have decayed. The required move to close at or above $80,000 by April 1 is now about 12.7%. Assuming typical BTC volatility (approx. 50-60% annualized), a target of $80k is roughly 1 standard deviation away over a 16-day horizon. The theoretical probability of hitting a 1 standard deviation move on a daily close over this window is roughly 18-22%. Giving strong weight to the anchor provided by the prediction market (27% at a higher price and longer time horizon), the retracement and time decay should drive the odds down to approximately 18%. Additionally, options markets price a European-style expiry above $80,000 by the end of June at ~35%, reinforcing that the short-term chance by April 1 is much lower.  Therefore, I place the probability at 0.18.
